description: The deny path is a first-class audit record; the tenant-day boundary opens a fresh genesis chain; an authority deny maps to a recorded deny.

cases.name: a DENIED access is recorded exactly like an allow — deny paths are never skipped
crossing the tenant-day boundary opens a second chain at genesis and both verify
a capability DENY maps to a valid deny audit record — the deny is not droppable
a partition-tagged record exports with its tag intact (GIPA survives the boundary)
